videos.title: Post-Call Processing & Webhooks
videos.lede: Turn every call into structured output: generate a summary, score success, extract custom JSON data, and POST it all to your systems - configured in the Webhooks Post Processing panel.

videos.title: Add a Knowledge Base to Your Agent
videos.lede: Upload your FAQs, policies, and support documents so your Smart Agent answers questions with accurate, up-to-date information.

videos.title: Connect an MCP Server to Your Agent
videos.lede: Bundle your automation flows and tools into an MCP server, then attach it to a Smart Agent so it can call them live during a conversation.

videos.title: Privacy & Recording Settings
videos.lede: Control what your Smart Agent keeps: turn call transcript and recording storage on or off, and choose whether to save the call audio.

videos.title: Agent Settings: Timeouts, Idle Messages & Voicemail
videos.lede: Fine-tune how your Smart Agent behaves on a call: maximum call length, silence and idle handling, voicemail (AMD) detection, backchannel, interruptions, and turn detection.

videos.title: Add Tools to Your Agent
videos.lede: Give your Smart Agent the ability to take actions - end calls, book appointments, transfer, or call your own APIs - using predefined tools and custom HTTP tools.

videos.title: Personalize Agents with Custom Variables
videos.lede: Feed your Smart Agent live context - a caller's name, address, and any custom fields - so it can greet people by name and tailor every conversation.

videos.title: Embed Your Agent on Your Website
videos.lede: Turn a Smart Agent into a website widget or popup with text, voice, and optional avatar, then paste one snippet of code to go live.

videos.title: Choose the Brain (LLM) for Your Agent
videos.lede: Pick the model that powers your Smart Agent's replies. Learn the difference between realtime (speech-to-speech) models and text (LLM + transcriber) models, and how to configure each.

videos.title: Set Up the Observer Agent
videos.lede: Run a second AI in the background that watches every live call, flags important moments as events, and can silently trigger tools - without slowing the main conversation.

videos.title: Test Your Agent
videos.lede: Try your Smart Agent before it goes live. Talk to it right in the browser with Test Agent, or place a real phone call to hear it end-to-end.

videos.title: Configure the Voice (TTS) for Your Agent
videos.lede: Choose the voice your Smart Agent speaks with. Pick a text-to-speech (TTS) provider, preview voices, filter by gender, accent, and age, and set a backup voice.

videos.title: Quickstart Guide - How To Create Your First Voice Agent With iMash
videos.lede: This guide provides step-by-step instructions on how to create, configure, and connect an AI voice agent in Imash, including integration with phone numbers, call handling, and system features.
